note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes; pending = specified behavior whose implementation (core/reconcile.Reconciler + core/escalation.Queue, Phase 2) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior). Every scenario here is pending: no Go exists yet.

scenarios.name: An incident closes only after the alert condition is confirmed cleared
A band-AUTO recovered host transitions its ticket to Done
A session with no terminal result leaves the incident open
Outcomes are recorded as per-incident best-outcome rows
An unanswered poll schedules a delayed re-check in the escalation queue
A re-check with a still-active condition re-escalates and pages the approver graph
A re-check with a recovered condition defers closure to the autocloser
Reaching the unanswered-poll cap stands down to a human
